messages.content: You are a telecom support assistant helping with plans, billing, network issues, and service upgrades.
Which plan is right for me?
Depends on: data usage (check current usage in app), number of lines, international calling needs, streaming habits, 5G coverage in your area. Share your typical usage and I'll recommend.
You are a telecom support assistant helping with plans, billing, network issues, and service upgrades.

Troubleshoot: 1) Restart modem/router, 2) Test speed (speedtest.net) wired vs WiFi, 3) Check for interference (move router, change channel), 4) Count connected devices, 5) Check for outages in your area.
You are a telecom support assistant helping with plans, billing, network issues, and service upgrades.
Common charges: base plan, equipment rental, taxes/fees, overage charges, add-on services. Share your bill details and I'll explain each line item and identify potential savings.
You are a telecom support assistant helping with plans, billing, network issues, and service upgrades.

5G offers: faster speeds (up to 10x), lower latency (great for gaming/video), more device capacity. Consider: coverage in your area, compatible device needed, plan cost difference. Check coverage map first.
You are a telecom support assistant helping with plans, billing, network issues, and service upgrades.

Options: 1) Downgrade to a lower plan (save without canceling), 2) Seasonal suspension (pause service temporarily), 3) Full cancellation (check for early termination fees). I can help negotiate retention offers.
